_comment: Anti-hallucination pattern data for vp_transcribe.py. EDIT THIS FILE (not
code) when Whisper is found to emit a new subtitle/caption credit on quiet
input. The matching LOGIC lives in vp_transcribe.py; only the DATA lives here.
Three categories, mirroring exactly what the code builds:
exact_blacklist        - whole-text exact matches (lowercased, rstripped),
compiled into the HALLUCINATIONS frozenset.
credit_phrase_prefixes - regex-source alternation branches for named-credit
phrases. The shared year tail is appended to the
WHOLE group, so each ONLY matches when the utterance
ends with a 4-digit year (see credit_phrase_year_tail).
Real dictation that merely STARTS with such a phrase
(no trailing year) is therefore never dropped.
bare_company_names     - regex-source branches for credit company names that
are specific enough to match WITHOUT a trailing year
(each carries its own optional ' <year>' suffix).
credit_phrase_year_tail is the shared regex tail appended ONCE after the
credit_phrase_prefixes alternation: up to 60 chars of text, then a 19xx/20xx
year. The full credit regex is anchored to the WHOLE stripped/lowercased text
and matched case-insensitively (re.IGNORECASE), so prefixes are lowercase.
Adding a new credit is a one-line edit to one of these lists.
exact_blacklist: tak for at du så med
tak for at du så med.
tak for at i så med
tak for at i så med.
